description: Happy path: body-step section with full inputs including step_content and target duration

input.topic: stylized bookshelf makeover using chalk paint and thrifted decor
input.step_content: Sand the thrifted bookshelf lightly with 220-grit sandpaper to create tooth for the chalk paint to grip

expect.script_text: present, written in second-person planning voice using 'you' to address the creator
expect.duration_estimate_seconds: integer, rough estimate near the target duration
expect.broll_suggestion: present, names a specific filming shot opportunity

prohibit: fabricated product names or brand names not in the input
verbatim teleprompter script instead of speaking notes

description: Minimal inputs: hook section with only required fields, defaults to youtube platform

input.topic: thrift store lamp transformation with spray paint

expect.script_text: present, planning voice, opens with a promise or problem statement
expect.duration_estimate_seconds: integer between 15 and 30 for youtube hook default

prohibit: duration longer than 30 seconds for a youtube hook

description: Edge case: broll-cue section produces editor-facing notes with zero spoken duration

input.topic: vintage brass hardware installation on a painted dresser

expect.script_text: present, contains editor-facing production notes not spoken copy

prohibit: spoken dialogue or creator-addressed speaking notes in script_text
